**Which agent?** (Bankruptcy Deal Finder / WB Review Responder / AI Business Assistant / New agent idea)

**What business type do you run?**

**What did you try to do?**

**What would save you time?** (Be specific: "I spend X hours/week on Y")

**Have you tried a workaround?** (What did you do instead?)
